name: Flavory Pot Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. On a sheet of foil, sprinkle the soup mix on all sides of the roast.
2. Top the roast with mushrooms.
3. Loosely wrap the roast, sealing the edges airtight with a double fold.
4. Place the wrapped roast in a shallow baking pan.
5. Bake at 375°F for 2 1/2 hours or until the meat is tender.
6. When the meat is done, remove it from the oven.
7. Open one end of the foil and pour the juices into a saucepan.
8. The juices may be served as natural gravy or thickened with flour.
9. Lift the meat to a serving platter.
